sections.title: Talking to Elkoy after starting the quest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Elkoy.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Oh my! Oh my!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's wrong?

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: The orb, they have the orb. We're doomed. Do you need me to show you through the maze?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Please help us get our orb back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not now, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Elkoy.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Oh my! Oh my!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's wrong?

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: The orb, they have the orb. We're doomed. Do you need me to show you back to the village?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Please help us get our orb back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not now, thanks.

lines.speaker: Remsai
lines.text: Oh my, oh my!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's wrong?

lines.speaker: Remsai
lines.text: The orb, they have the orb. It must be returned or we're doomed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, how are you?

lines.speaker: Kalron
lines.text: Oh my. I'll never find my way back before Khazard's men come and hunt me down.

sections.title: Before agreeing to bring logs to Montai

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Bolren.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Hello traveller, we must retrieve the orb. It's being held by Khazard troops north of here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll try my best.

sections.title: After agreeing to bring logs to Montai

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Bolren.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: The orb is being held at the battlefield north of the maze.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Well hello stranger. My name's Bolren, I'm the king of the tree gnomes.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: I'm surprised you made it in, maybe I made the maze too easy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: I'm afraid I have more serious concerns at the moment. Very serious.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I help at all?

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: I'm glad you asked.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: The truth is my people are in grave danger. We have always been protected by the Spirit Tree. No creature of dark can harm us while its three orbs are in place.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: We are not a violent race, but we fight when we must. Many gnomes have fallen battling the dark forces of Khazard to the North.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: We became desperate, so we took one orb of protection to the battlefield. It was a foolish move.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Khazard troops seized the orb. Now we are completely defenceless.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How can I help?

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: You would be a huge benefit on the battlefield. If you would go there and try to retrieve the orb, my people and I will be forever grateful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I would be glad to help.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Thank you. The battlefield is to the north of the maze. Commander Montai will inform you of their current situation.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: That is if he's still alive.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: My assistant shall guide you out. Good luck friend, try your best to return the orb

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: We're out of the maze now. Please hurry, we must have the orb if we are to survive.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry but I won't be involved.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Ok then, travel safe.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll leave you to it then.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Ok, take care.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: Hello traveller, are you here to help or just to watch?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've been sent by King Bolren to retrieve the orb of protection.

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: Excellent we need all the help we can get.

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: I'm commander Montai. The orb is in the Khazard stronghold to the north, but until we weaken their defences we can't get close.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can I do?

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: Firstly we need to strengthen our own defences. We desperately need wood to make more battlements, once the battlements are gone it's all over. Six loads of normal logs should do it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry I no longer want to be involved.

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: That's a shame, we could have done with your help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll gather some wood.

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: Please be as quick as you can, I don't know how much longer we can hold out.

sections.title: Attempting to fire the ballista before the repairs

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 1
lines.text: I can't talk now. Can't you see we're trying to win a battle here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi there.

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 2
lines.text: The battle is far from over. If you have a pure heart you will help us win.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi there.

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 3
lines.text: I can't stand this war. The misery, the pain, it's driving me crazy! When will it end?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, how are you?

lines.speaker: Khazard warlord
lines.text: Don't speak to me you insignificant wretch! Die in the name of Khazard!

sections.title: Talking to Elkoy after agreeing to help Montai

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: You must retrieve the orb, or the gnome village is doomed. Do you need me to show you through the maze?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: Hello again, we're still desperate for wood soldier. We need six loads of normal logs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll see what I can do.

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: Hello again, we're still desperate for wood soldier.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some here. (You give six loads of logs to the commander.)

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: That's excellent, now we can make more defensive battlements. Give me a moment to organise the troops and then come speak to me. I'll inform you of our next phase of attack.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are you doing Montai?

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: We're hanging in there soldier. For the next phase of our attack we need to breach their stronghold.

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: The ballista can break through the stronghold wall, and then we can advance and seize back the orb.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what's the problem?

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: From this distance we can't get an accurate enough shot. We need the correct coordinates of the stronghold for a direct hit. I've sent out three tracker gnomes to gather them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have they returned?

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: I'm afraid not, and we're running out of time. I need you to go into the heart of the battlefield, find the trackers, and bring back the coordinates.

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: Do you think you can do it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I've had enough of your battle.

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: I understand, this isn't your fight.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll try my best.

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: Thank you, you're braver than most.

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: I don't know how long I will be able to hold out. Once you have the coordinates come back and fire the ballista right into those monsters.

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: If you can retrieve the orb and bring safety back to my people, none of the blood spilled on this field will be in vain.

sections.title: Commander Montai while getting the coordinates

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: Hello warrior. We need the coordinates for a direct hit from the ballista. Once you have a direct hit you will be able to enter the stronghold and retrieve the orb.

sections.title: Attempting to enter the stronghold early

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know the coordinates of the Khazard stronghold?

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 1
lines.text: I managed to get one, although it wasn't easy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well done.

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 1
lines.text: The other two tracker gnomes should have the other coordinates if they're still alive.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: OK, take care.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you OK?

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 2
lines.text: They caught me spying on the stronghold. They beat and tortured me.

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 2
lines.text: But I didn't crack. I told them nothing. They can't break me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry little man.

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 2
lines.text: Don't be. I have the position of the stronghold!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well done.

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 2
lines.text: Now leave before they find you and all is lost.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hang in there.

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 2
lines.text: Go!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you OK?

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 3
lines.text: OK? Who's OK? Not me! Hee hee!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's wrong?

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 3
lines.text: You can't see me, no one can. Monsters, demons, they're all around me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 3
lines.text: They're dancing, all of them, hee hee.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have the coordinate for the Khazard stronghold?

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 3
lines.text: Who holds the stronghold?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 3
lines.text: Less than my hands.

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 3
lines.text: More than my head, less than my fingers.

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 3
lines.text: More than we, less than our feet.

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 3
lines.text: My legs and your legs, ha ha ha!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're mad.

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 3
lines.text: Dance with me, and Khazard's men are beat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll pray for you little man.

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 3
lines.text: All day we pray in the hay, hee hee.

sections.title: Commander Montai after shooting the ballista

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've breached the stronghold.

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: I saw, that was a beautiful sight. The Khazard troops didn't know what hit them.

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: Now is the time to retrieve the orb. It's all in your hands. I'll be praying for you.

sections.title: Talking to Tracker gnome 1 after successfully firing the ballista

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 1
lines.text: Well done, you've broken down their defences. This battle must be ours.

sections.title: Talking to Tracker gnome 2 after successfully firing the ballista

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 2
lines.text: Well done, you've broken down their defences. This battle must be ours.

sections.title: Talking to Tracker gnome 3 after successfully firing the ballista

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 3
lines.text: Don't talk to me, you can't see me. No one can, just the demons.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That tracker gnome was a bit vague about the x coordinate! What could it be?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Evidently that wasn't the right x coordinate.

sections.title: Upon opening the chest containing the orb of protection

lines.speaker: Khazard commander
lines.text: Oi! You! Get out of there.

sections.title: Opening the stronghold door from the outside
Commander Montai after getting the orb

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have the orb of protection.

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: Incredible, for a human you really are something.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks... I think!

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: I'll stay here with my troops and try and hold Khazard's men back. You return the orb to the gnome village. Go as quick as you can, the village is still unprotected.

sections.title: Tracker gnome 1 after getting the orb

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are you tracker?

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 1
lines.text: Now we have the orb I'm much better. They won't stand a chance without it.

sections.title: Tracker gnome 2 after getting the orb

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are you tracker?

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 2
lines.text: Now we have the orb I'm much better. Soon my comrades will come and free me.

sections.title: Tracker gnome 3 after getting the orb
Talking to Elkoy without the orb after finding it

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Elkoy.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: You're back! And the orb?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm afraid not.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Please, we must have the orb if we are to survive. Do you need me to show you through the maze?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Please help us get our orb back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not now, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Elkoy.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: You're back! And the orb?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm afraid not.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Please, we must have the orb if we are to survive. Do you need me to show you through the maze?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Please help us get our orb back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not now, thanks.

sections.title: Talking to Remsai without the orb after finding it

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Remsai.

lines.speaker: Remsai
lines.text: Hello, did you find the orb?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm afraid not.

lines.speaker: Remsai
lines.text: Please, we must have the orb if we are to survive.

sections.title: Talking to Bolren without the orb after finding it

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Bolren.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Do you have the orb?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm afraid not.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Please, we must have the orb if we are to survive.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Elkoy. I have the orb.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Take it to King Bolren, I'm sure he'll be pleased to see you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you show me out of the village?

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Please return with our orb soon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Elkoy.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: You're back! And the orb?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have it here.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: You're our saviour. Please return it to the village and we are all saved. Would you like me to show you the way to the village?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Here we are. Take the orb to King Bolren, I'm sure he'll be pleased to see you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks Elkoy.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Please, we must have the orb if we are to survive.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Remsai.

lines.speaker: Remsai
lines.text: Hello, did you find the orb?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have it here.

lines.speaker: Remsai
lines.text: You're our saviour.

sections.title: Local Gnomes after getting the orb

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello little man.

lines.speaker: Local Gnome
lines.text: Little man stronger than big man. Hee hee, lardi dee, lardi da.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Bolkoy
lines.text: Amazing, you recovered the orb.

lines.speaker: Bolkoy
lines.text: Well I am impressed. Would you like to buy something?

lines.speaker: Khazard commander
lines.text: Don't even think of taking the orb!

sections.title: Talking to Elkoy after giving Bolren the orb of protection

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Elkoy.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Did you hear?

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Khazard's men have pillaged the village! They slaughtered many, and took the other orbs in an attempt to lead us out of the maze. When will the misery end?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you show me out of the village?

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Please help us find the orbs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm very sorry.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Elkoy.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Did you hear?

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Khazard's men have pillaged the village! They slaughtered many, and took the other orbs in an attempt to lead us out of the maze. When will the misery end?

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Would you like me to show you the way to the village?

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Here we are. Despite what has happened here, I hope you feel welcome.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks Elkoy.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Ok then, take care.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you ok?

lines.speaker: Remsai
lines.text: Khazard's men came. Without the orb we were defenceless. They killed many and then took our last hope, the other orbs.

lines.speaker: Remsai
lines.text: Now surely we're all doomed. Without them the spirit tree is useless.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Kalron
lines.text: Oh my, oh my, the village has been pillaged and I'm still lost. Oh dear.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Local Gnome
lines.text: Must save the orbs and kill the Khazard warlord. That will be fun, hee hee.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Montai, how are you?

lines.speaker: Commander Montai
lines.text: I'm ok, this battle is going to take longer to win than I expected. The Khazard troops won't give up even without the orb.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hang in there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Bolkoy
lines.text: Oh, hello there. Have you heard? They took the other orbs, it's terrible. I suppose the show must go on.

lines.speaker: Bolkoy
lines.text: Would you like to buy something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 1
lines.text: When will this battle end? I feel like I've been fighting forever.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 2
lines.text: When will this battle end? I feel like I've been locked up my whole life.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Tracker gnome 3
lines.text: I feel dizzy, where am I? Oh dear, oh dear I need some rest.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think you do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Khazard warlord
lines.text: You think you're so clever. You know nothing!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Khazard warlord
lines.text: I'll crush you and those pesky little green men!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have the orb.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Oh my... The misery, the horror!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: King Bolren, are you OK?

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Thank you traveller, but it's too late. We're all doomed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened?

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: They came in the night. I don't know how many, but enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who?

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Khazard troops. They slaughtered anyone who got in their way. Women, children, my wife.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: They took the other orbs, now we are defenceless.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where did they take them?

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: They headed north of the stronghold. A warlord carries the orbs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will find the warlord and bring back the orbs.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: You are brave, but this task will be tough even for you. I wish you the best of luck. Once again you are our only hope.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: I will safeguard this orb and pray for your safe return. My assistant will guide you out.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Good luck friend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry but I can't help

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: I understand, this isn't your battle.

sections.title: If not attacked for around 30 seconds

lines.speaker: Khazard warlord
lines.text: Bah, enough of you!

sections.title: Talking to the Khazard warlord again after defeating him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I thought I killed you?

lines.speaker: Khazard warlord
lines.text: Fool, warriors blessed by Khazard don't die. You can't kill that which is already dead. However I can kill you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Elkoy.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: You truly are a hero.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: You saved us by returning the orbs of protection. I'm humbled and wish you well. Would you like me to show you through the maze?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Here we are. Have a safe journey.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not now, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Elkoy.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: You truly are a hero.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: You saved us by returning the orbs of protection. I'm humbled and wish you well.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Would you like me to show you the way to the village?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Here we are. Feel free to have a look around.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks Elkoy.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Ok then, take care.

sections.title: Talking to Remsai after getting the orbs

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've returned.

lines.speaker: Remsai
lines.text: You're back, well done brave adventurer. Now the orbs are safe we can perform the ritual for the spirit tree. We can live in peace once again.

sections.title: Talking to the Local Gnomes after getting the orbs

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello gnome.

lines.speaker: Local Gnome
lines.text: Soon we're gonna have the sacred ceremony and boy am I going to party. Lock up your daughters. Hee hee.

sections.title: Talking to Kalron after getting the orbs

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello little man.

lines.speaker: Kalron
lines.text: Hello. I hope they come out and find me soon. It's getting cold.

sections.title: Talking to Bolkoy after getting the orbs

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Bolkoy
lines.text: Hello there. You're that hero who saved the orbs. Soon we will perform the ritual and the village will be safe again.

lines.speaker: Bolkoy
lines.text: Anyway, would you like anything from my shop?

sections.title: Talking to King Bolren without the orbs after getting them

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bolren, I have returned.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: You made it back! Do you have the orbs?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm afraid not.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Please, we must have the orbs if we are to survive.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You there, stop!

lines.speaker: Khazard warlord
lines.text: Go back to your pesky little green friends.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've come for the orbs.

lines.speaker: Khazard warlord
lines.text: You're out of your depth traveller. These orbs are part of a much larger picture.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They're stolen goods, now give them here!

lines.speaker: Khazard warlord
lines.text: Ha, you really think you stand a chance? I'll crush you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bolren, I have returned.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: You made it back! Do you have the orbs?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have them here.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Hooray, you're amazing. I didn't think it was possible but you've saved us.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Once the orbs are replaced we will be safe once more. We must begin the ceremony immediately.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What does the ceremony involve?

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: The spirit tree has looked over us for centuries. Now we must pay our respects.

lines.speaker: [Northern Local Gnomes]
lines.text: Su tana.

lines.speaker: [Southern Local Gnomes]
lines.text: En tania.

lines.speaker: [Northern Local Gnomes]
lines.text: Su tana.

lines.speaker: [Southern Local Gnomes]
lines.text: En tania.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Now at last my people are safe once more. We can live in peace again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm pleased I could help.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: You are modest brave traveller.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: Please, for your efforts take this amulet. It's made from the same sacred stone as the orbs of protection. It will help keep you safe on your journeys.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you King Bolren.

lines.speaker: King Bolren
lines.text: The tree has many other powers, some of which I cannot reveal. As a friend of the gnome people, I can now allow you to use the tree's magic to teleport to other trees grown from related seeds.
